description_long: This lamp features a modern, sculptural design with two elegantly curved wooden arms that rise from a circular black base and meet at the top, forming a symmetrical, open teardrop shape. The base is solid and flat, providing stability, and is finished in a matte black color. A visible power cord extends from the base, indicating it is electrically powered. The lamp's arms are likely made of light-colored wood or a wood-like material, with a smooth, polished surface. The design is minimalist, with no visible lampshade or ornate detailing, emphasizing clean lines and contemporary aesthetics. The light source is likely integrated along the inner edges of the wooden arms, providing indirect illumination.
description: A modern floor lamp with two curved wooden arms forming an open teardrop shape on a black circular base, featuring a minimalist and sculptural design.
description_view_0: Front view shows the full teardrop silhouette with both curved arms and the circular black base clearly visible.
description_view_1: Side view reveals the slim profile of the lamp, with the arms appearing almost parallel and the base as a flat circle.
description_view_2: Rear view mirrors the front, showing the open teardrop form and the power cord extending from the base.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, similar to view 1, highlights the narrowness of the lamp's profile and the extended power cord.
